# SecKeyCopyAttributes(_:)

**Function**

Gets the attributes of a given key.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecKeyCopyAttributes(_ key: SecKey) -> CFDictionary?
```

## Parameters

- **key**: The key whose attributes you want.

## Return Value

A dictionary containing the key’s attributes. In Objective-C, call the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFRelease] function to free this dictionary’s memory when you are done with it.
title: SecKeyCopyAttributes(_:)
